# Measurement Dictionary

| Metric | Type | Definition | Use |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Gist recall | Outcome | Whether viewer understood the main point. | Primary in most comprehension experiments. |
| Action recall | Outcome | Whether viewer knows the recommended action or takeaway. | Primary for advice/tutorial clips. |
| Contrast recall | Outcome | Whether viewer remembers the Not X → Y or false-belief/correction relation. | Primary for OFC/CPC experiments. |
| Exact recall | Outcome | Recall of exact wording/details. | Guardrail where full content matters. |
| Visual recall | Guardrail | Recall of face, object, action, scene, or product detail. | Detects whether text stole gaze. |
| Perceived effort | Subjective | Mental effort rating, usually 1–7. | Core load measure. |
| Text dwell time | Gaze | Time gaze spends on text AOI. | Cost side of meaning efficiency. |
| ROI dwell time | Gaze | Time gaze spends on face/mouth/hands/product/action. | Non-interference guardrail. |
| Meaning per Second | Composite | Recall composite divided by seconds watched. | Platform-friendly efficiency metric. |
| Meaning per Fixation | Composite | Recall composite divided by fixation/dwell cost. | Research-grade efficiency metric. |
| Completion rate | Platform | Percent of viewers completing clip. | Retention metric. |
| Confusion comments | Platform/Qualitative | Comments asking what happened or showing misunderstanding. | Ethical retention guardrail. |
